caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: Strong winds are building across the Western Caribbean, particularly around Roatan, with forecasted winds reaching 23 kt and wave heights of 5.5 ft. I expect the dominant ENE swell direction to impact marine activities, with a 47% chance of rain in the area, while Martinique in the Lesser Antilles will experience relatively calmer conditions with max winds of 11 kt.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Increase
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing northwest winds of 25 kt and wave heights of 6.9 ft, with a 70% chance of rain, making it the top impact port in the Mediterranean today. Haifa, in comparison, is expecting much calmer conditions with winds of 15 kt, but Mykonos will need to take precautions for the increased wind and wave activity.
